examples: All that remains is the love of her adorable Denis and the angelic Mark.
Wouldn't you have a husband and some angelic children in your lovely house?
This angelic laser begins slowly the gradual process of transforming the virginal human body to the essence of the soul itself.
My angelic mother visits him every day and indeed has sacrificed much of her life for him.
The figure had an angelic upturned face and was seated at a desk and holding a quill.
